title: What will it be?
content:
p(alert). I'm trying very hard to keep *breadcrumb* from being *thoughtsbox* so I'll try not to criticize too much. ;)

Tomorrow's Thaksin Saturday-(a)Lone-Talk-Show is somewhat a "must listen". It's quite _predictable_ that he'll be using this hour-long radio show to talk about the stocks deal of his Shin Corp. He might also use the program to send signal to his *guards* to do everything to prevent people coming to Bangkok (to join the afternoon protest, of course). And finally, I _predict_ that he'll be using his radio show to talk trash about those who decides to go against him.

Did I use the word _predict_? I know, I'm just stating the obvious.
